title: IIAC annual report: 2024 to 2025
body: "This annual report sets out the activities and achievements of the Industrial Injuries Advisory Council (IIAC) from April 2024 to March 2025. It covers:    IIAC’s key achievements a summary of the work undertaken details of IIAC’s membership and public meetings   The report also provides expenditure information for the financial year 2024 to 2025.  "
